zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Havering於大約1279年出生在英國英格蘭艾可哈維林-亞特-包維爾時，他的父親John De Havering38歲，母親Joan de Darcy25歲。他於大約1313年與Margaret de Grapenell在英國英格蘭賀特福爾洛金結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1335年在英國艾可素騰--希亞享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Havering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Havering atte Bower (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Havering was born about 1279, in Havering-atte-Bower, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John De Havering, was 38 and his mother, Joan de Darcy, was 25. He married Margaret de Grapenell about 1313, in Throcking, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1335, in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Havering est né environ 1279, à Havering-atte-Bower, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Havering, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan de Darcy, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Grapenell environ 1313, à Throcking, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1335, à Southend-on-Sea, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Er hat um 1313 in Throcking, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Grapenell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Haveringが約1279年にイギリスイギリスエセックスヘイバーイング-アッテ-ボウエルで生まれた時，父John De Haveringは38歳，母Joan de Darcyは25歳であった。約1313年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスロクイングでMargaret de Grapenellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1335年にイギリスエセックスソウスエンド-オン-セアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Havering(이)가 대략 1279년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 하버링-엇-보워에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Havering(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Darcy(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스록잉에서 Margaret de Grapenell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 영국 에세스 소우테드--시에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Havering родился около 1279 г. в местности хавиринг-атте-боуир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John De Havering было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Darcy, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Grapenell около 1313 г. в местности троккинг, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1335 г. в местности соутенд-он-сеа, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.
